closingChain.label: Due Diligence
closingChain.description: Property inspected and insurance coverage verified

closingChain.label: Underwriting
closingChain.description: Lender reviews financial package and underwrites the loan

closingChain.label: Loan Committee

closingChain.label: Closing

closingChain.label: Financing
closingChain.description: Lender approves loan or buyer confirms equity
